entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
Learn to sight-sing in multiple keys, time signatures, and with various rhythms. Train ears with melodic and rhythmic ear tests, learn how to compose music, and begin work on sight-singing exercises independently before checking work. Audio lessons are included in the lesson plans.

Skills Focus: Keys, time signatures, sol-fa syllables and hand signs, ear test, music copywork, sharps and flats.

This topic is included in the following course(s): Music: Level 3

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content: Prerequisite: Sight-Singing with Sol-fa Level 2 or appropriate skill proficiency. Students in Grades 4+ with no experience with sol-fa or sight-reading music should start with Level 2.
